identity.primary_title: Hands-On Chief Solutions Architect / Fractional CTO

headline_variants.default: Hands-On Chief Solutions Architect / Fractional CTO | AI, fintech, and data-heavy products | Discovery to delivery leadership

bio_variants.default: I step in when a client needs more than another senior engineer and less risk than the wrong full-time CTO hire. My best work sits at the intersection of consulting discovery, solution architecture, and hands-on delivery.
